assertions.assertion: The web.app client has RequirePkce = true and does not set it to false
assertions.rationale: PKCE requirement is well-known OAuth security best practice

assertions.assertion: The web.app client redirect URIs contain no wildcards - all URIs are exact-match fully-qualified HTTPS URIs
assertions.rationale: Wildcard redirect URI risks are well-documented in OAuth security literature

assertions.assertion: The web.app client uses GrantTypes.Code (not CodeAndClientCredentials or Implicit)
assertions.rationale: Using Code only for interactive clients is well-known best practice

assertions.assertion: The web.app client has AccessTokenLifetime of 900 or less (15 minutes maximum)
assertions.rationale: Short access token lifetimes are recommended in security best practices; 5-15 min is common advice

assertions.assertion: The web.app client has RefreshTokenUsage = TokenUsage.OneTimeOnly
assertions.rationale: Without skill, an LLM might not specifically use the Duende enum TokenUsage.OneTimeOnly or might use a different property name
